name: beamer-deck-auto
description: XeLaTeX Beamer slide automation: three-tier template library, layout optimizer, and design grammar checker for academic presentations.

interface.shortDescription: Automated XeLaTeX Beamer slide design with layout optimization
interface.longDescription: Three-tier template system (Theme/Layout/Component) for Beamer slides. Includes layout optimizer, design grammar checker, and auto-crop tools. Handles Overfull \vbox, column balancing, image aspect-ratio decisions, and tabular conversion.
defaultPrompt: Build a beamer slide deck for my paper
Fix Overfull \vbox in my beamer presentation
Choose layout for wide image in beamer slide
